projects

Software and otherwise. Same format, same tags — no artificial separation.

fermentation log
active

An ongoing experiment in lacto-fermentation, kombucha, tepache, and whatever else seems interesting. Not software — just microbes and patience.

fermentationmaking
health-appointment-scheduler ↗
active

Role-based appointment scheduling platform for healthcare providers and patients. Laravel 11, React 18, TypeScript, Inertia.js, PostgreSQL.

devlaravelreacttypescriptpostgresql
sentinel-l7 ↗
active

AI-driven compliance monitoring for financial transactions. Multi-process system — stream consumer, web dashboard, reclaimer — with semantic caching and policy RAG via Upstash Vector.

devlaravelvueredisaiphp
sewing
active

Making clothes that fit. Currently working through Merchant & Mills patterns. Slow fashion, good fabric, zero fast-fashion guilt.
